memoryArtifacts.description: She was to great help to her husband and governed the state during his rule.[4] She was loyal to her husband and state, and it was she who persuaded the nobles at an assembly in Arad to execute 68 Hun …

popularStory.headline: Géza II (Hungarian: II. Géza; Croatian: Gejza II; Slovak: Gejza II; 1130-31 May 1162)
popularStory.description: Géza II (Hungarian: II. Géza; Croatian: Gejza II; Slovak: Gejza II; 1130-31 May 1162) was King of Hungary and Croatia from 1141 to 1162. He was the oldest son of Béla the Blind and his wife, Helena of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary於1115年出生在塞爾維亞Рашки時，她的父親Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška31歲，母親Anna Diogenissa41歲。她於1129年4月28日與Bela II King of Hungary在匈牙利托爾納托爾納結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1146年在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年31歲，埋葬在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary于1115年出生在塞尔维亚Рашки时，她的父亲Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška31岁，母亲Anna Diogenissa41岁。她于1129年4月28日与Bela II King of Hungary在匈牙利托爾納托爾納结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1146年在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年31岁，埋葬在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Jelena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary was born in 1115, in Raški, Serbia, her father, Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška, was 31 and her mother, Anna Diogenissa, was 41. She married Bela II King of Hungary on 28 April 1129, in Tolna, Tolna, Hungary. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1146, in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary, at the age of 31, and was buried in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary.

fr.Rasa, Varna, Bolzano, Trentino-Alto Adig: Rasa, Varna, Bolzano, Trentino-Alto Adige, Italie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary est née en 1115, à Raški, Serbie, son père, Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anna Diogenissa, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Bela II King of Hungary le 28 avril 1129, à Tolna, Tolna, Hongrie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1146, à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie.

de.Rasa, Varna, Bolzano, Trentino-Alto Adig: Raas, Vahrn, Bolzano, Trentino-Alto Adige, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary 1115 in Raški, Serbien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška 31 und ihre Mutter Anna Diogenissa 41. Sie hat am 28. April 1129 in Tolna, Tolna, Ungarn Bela II King of Hungary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1146 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn und wurde in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary è nata il nel 1115 nel Raški, Serbien, sua padre, Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Anna Diogenissa, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Bela II King of Hungary il 28 aprile 1129, nel Tolna, Tolna, Ungheria. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1146, nel Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria.

ja.lifeSummary: Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungaryが1115年にセルビアРашкиで生まれた時，父Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raškaは31歳，母Anna Diogenissaは41歳であった。1129年4月28日にハンガリートルナトルナでBela II King of Hungaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1146年にハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルで31歳で死去し，ハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルにて埋葬された。

ko.Rasa, Varna, Bolzano, Trentino-Alto Adig: 이탈리아 트렌틴-알토 아디지 볼자노 바른아 라사
ko.lifeSummary: Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary(이)가 1115년 세르비아 Рашки에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Diogenissa(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1129년 4월 28일 헝가리 톨나 톨나에서 Bela II King of Hungary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1146년 헝가리 프제이e르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 헝가리 프제이e르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary nasceu em 1115, em Raški, Sérvia, seu pai, Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Anna Diogenissa, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Bela II King of Hungary em 28 de abril de 1129, em Tolna, Tolna, Hungria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1146, em Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungria, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungria.

ru.Rasa, Varna, Bolzano, Trentino-Alto Adig: раса, варна, болзано, трентино-алто адидж, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary родилась в 1115 г. в местности Рашки, Сербия, её отцу по имени Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anna Diogenissa, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bela II King of Hungary 28 апреля 1129 г. в местности толна, толна, Венгрия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1146 г. в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary nació en 1115, en Raški, Serbia, su papá, Župan Uroš I Vukanović of Raška, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Anna Diogenissa, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Bela II King of Hungary el 28 de abril de 1129, en Tolna, Tolna, Hungría. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1146, en Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungría, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungría.
